Check what drove Gold volume on June 1st (last Monday) — a specific campaign or B2B order cycle that did not repeat.

anomalies.key: jaipur
anomalies.insight: Jaipur down 32% week-on-week (111 vs 162) and 4σ below range — the most severe sustained city-level decline. Jaipur has been consistently underperforming vs last week. Check if a Jaipur collection centre closed, a phlebo partner was lost, or a major Jaipur B2B client churned in the last 7 days.

anomalies.key: Magnesium
anomalies.insight: Magnesium down 44% week-on-week (99 vs 178) and 1.8σ below range. Magnesium has been declining week-on-week for multiple consecutive days now — this is a sustained trend, not a one-day anomaly. Escalate to the product team to investigate App/web search ranking, page content, and slot availability for Magnesium. Check if a competitor is pricing it significantly lower.

anomalies.key: ranchi × PICKUP_POINTS
anomalies.insight: Ranchi Pickup Points up 86% week-on-week (54 vs 29) and 5.7σ above range. The weekly comparison confirms this is not just a Sunday-to-Monday swing — Ranchi Pickup Points are genuinely higher this week than last. A new B2B client or Pickup Point location in Ranchi activated in the last 7 days. Ops team to document and ensure capacity.

anomalies.key: bangalore × Magnesium
anomalies.insight: Bangalore Magnesium down 87% week-on-week (5 vs 38) and 3.8σ below range. Bangalore is driving the national Magnesium decline disproportionately — 33 fewer orders in one city. Check if a Bangalore-specific listing issue, slot shortage, or phlebo change affected Magnesium availability in Bangalore this week.

anomalies.key: Comprehensive Platinum Full Body Checkup with Smart Rep
anomalies.insight: Platinum down 25% week-on-week (237 vs 315) and 1.6σ below range. Third consecutive week-on-week package decline (Gold, Silver, Platinum all down).
